devdoc.author: Jordi Baylina
devdoc.details: This contract will be the SNT controller during the contribution period.  This contract will determine the rules during this period.  Final users will generally not interact directly with this contract. ETH will  be sent to the SNT token contract. The ETH is sent to this contract and from here,  ETH is sent to the contribution walled and SNTs are mined according to the defined  rules.

params._newOwner: The address of the new owner. 0x0 can be used to create  an unowned neutral vault, however that cannot be undone

params._token: The address of the token contract that you want to recover  set to 0 in case you want to extract ether.

params._destEthDevs: Destination address where the contribution ether is sent
params._destTokensDevs: Address where the tokens for the dev are sent
params._destTokensReserve: Address where the tokens for the reserve are sent
params._destTokensSgt: Address of the exchanger SGT-SNT where the SNT are sent  to be distributed to the SGT holders.
params._dynamicCeiling: Address of the contract that controls the ceiling
params._endBlock: The last block that the contribution period is active
params._maxSGTSupply: Quantity of SGT tokens that would represent 10% of status.
params._sgt: Address of the SGT token contract
params._snt: Address of the SNT token contract
params._sntController: Token controller for the SNT that will be transferred after  the contribution finalizes.
params._startBlock: Block when the contribution period starts

params._th: SNT holder where the SNTs will be minted.

devdoc.title: StatusContribution Contract

changeOwner(address).notice: `owner` can step down and assign some other address to this role

claimTokens(address).notice: This method can be used by the controller to extract mistakenly  sent tokens to this contract.

finalize().notice: This method will can be called by the owner before the contribution period  end or by anybody after the `endBlock`. This method finalizes the contribution period  by creating the remaining tokens and transferring the controller to the configured  controller.

initialize(address,address,uint256,uint2.notice: This method should be called by the owner before the contribution  period starts This initializes most of the parameters

pauseContribution().notice: Pauses the contribution if there is any issue

proxyPayment(address).notice: This method will generally be called by the SNT token contract to  acquire SNTs. Or directly from third parties that want to acquire SNTs in  behalf of a token holder.

setGuaranteedAddress(address,uint256).notice: Sets the limit for a guaranteed address. All the guaranteed addresses  will be able to get SNTs during the contribution period with his own  specific limit.  This method should be called by the owner after the initialization  and before the contribution starts.
